raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general request to look at a research paragraph centrally includes checking whether the argument and technical claims are internally coherent.","R1.6":"Because the delegation targets a paragraph, sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and register are central expected responsibilities.","RX.1":"Any projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is brief and underspecified.","RX.2":"The reviewer must avoid inflating the scope beyond what a paragraph-level look can support.","RX.3":"The task is limited to projecting responsibility rather than editing, rewriting, or fully reviewing the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or unsupported technical conclusions downstream.","RX.5":"The projected responsibilities should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the provided artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A general request to look at a research paragraph centrally includes checking whether the argument and technical claims are internally coherent.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation targets a paragraph, sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and register are central expected responsibilities.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is brief and underspecified.
rationale.RX.2: The reviewer must avoid inflating the scope beyond what a paragraph-level look can support.
rationale.RX.3: The task is limited to projecting responsibility rather than editing, rewriting, or fully reviewing the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or unsupported technical conclusions downstream.
rationale.RX.5: The projected responsibilities should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the provided artifact.
